label: Pairwise kinship θ (Jacquard EM)
description: Per-pair θ from ngsRelate Jacquard EM. Column 'theta' of the .res output.

label: KING-robust kinship per pair
description: Per-pair KING-robust kinship. Column 'KING' of the .res output. Source for the adaptive scheduler's per-pair KING-class prior.

label: Jacquard 9-coefficient vector per pair
description: J1–J9 columns of the .res output. Load-bearing for ngsPedigree; untouched by the fork patch.

label: IBS0/IBS1/IBS2 counts per pair
description: Identity-by-state site counts per pair. IBS0 used for parent_offspring vs full_sibling split.

label: Per-chromosome adaptive .res (23-column)
description: Stage-2-compatible per-chromosome .res file produced by the adaptive scheduler. Byte-equivalent column schema to the uniform-stride per-chrom .res; differs only in row-level site budgeting provenance, recorded in the co-emitted adaptive_run_manifest.

label: 6-gate adaptive validation report (JSON)
description: Per-chromosome verdicts for SPEC §6 gates 1–6 against the uniform-stride baseline. Tier-1 (Gates 4, 6) are hard fails; tier-2 (Gate 1) numeric target; tier-3 (Gates 2, 3, 5) informational.
